verdicts.observed: Candidate preserves barrel buoy body for BOYBAR01 with the required/source-reference colour treatment (red, black) and no conflicting buoy-family substitution. verdicts.observed: Candidate is a conical/nun buoy with clean horizontal blue, red, white, blue bands only. It removes the previous muddy overlay, but still does not show the vertical blue stripe/element required by COLPAT1,2 and visible in the OpenCPN witness.
verdicts.expected: BOYCON81 must preserve conical/nun buoy shape and the blue-red-white-blue special-purpose colour sequence with both horizontal and vertical stripe semantics from COLPAT1,2.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail under the standard visual/semantic judge: the shape and colour list are present, but the mixed horizontal/vertical stripe family remains unresolved. This is safety-relevant because a pure horizontal stack can read as a different special-purpose buoy variant. No final approval implied.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw BOYCON81 against the OpenCPN/reference witness so the blue-red-white-blue horizontal/vertical stripe pattern is unambiguous; include the vertical blue element rather than a purely horizontal band stack.
